creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Although the server's accessible again, I'd suggest you contact the 
administrators and/or upstream to find alternative mirrors. From casual 
browsing of bsd.sites.mk all the ftp.dti.ad.jp sites mentioned there are 
still around, so it looks like xearth has been dropped. You have a few 
mirrors there though, so perhaps you could just chop those out and stick 
with the five or so you already have?
